title: Potential Path Traversal in Feature Requests
description: The feature request command allows for file paths that could lead to path traversal vulnerabilities. Input paths need sanitization and validation against a whitelist.

root_cause_potential: Insufficient input validation on file paths
No whitelist validation for acceptable paths
Security vulnerability in file system access
technical_analysis.suggested_solution: Ensure that input paths are sanitized and validated against a whitelist of acceptable paths

immediate_fixes.action: Add whitelist for acceptable file paths
immediate_fixes.rationale: Restrict access to authorized directories only

immediate_fixes.action: Add security testing for path validation
immediate_fixes.rationale: Ensure path traversal protection works correctly

impact_assessment.user_impact: Medium - Security vulnerability could allow unauthorized access
impact_assessment.functionality_impact: Medium - Affects feature request system security
impact_assessment.urgency: Medium - Security issue requiring prompt attention
